blockers.title: Missing wall-time circuit breaker enforcement
blockers.evidence: state_machine.md lists max_wall_time_minutes but no enforcement step in BUILD loop.
blockers.why_it_matters: Without it, unattended runs can loop indefinitely and burn budget.
blockers.suggested_fix: Add a time check at the start of each phase iteration and abort to REPORT when exceeded.

requested_changes: Add explicit time/budget checks in the conductor loop before calling any model.
non_blocking_notes: Consider saving a condensed diff summary per iteration for easier review.
